name: Vellum AI
description: Enterprise platform for building, evaluating, and governing AI agents at scale. Combines no-code visual builder with Python/TypeScript SDKs for flexible agent development, deployment, and monitoring.
capabilities: Agent building from natural language prompts
notes: Enterprise-grade platform with SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA compliance. Strong focus on evaluations, tracing, and observability for production agents. Recent updates (Jan-Feb 2026) include Microsoft Teams integration and mock data generation for testing.
